forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the south. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the eastern border in the late morning. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the eastern border in the late morning. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning frost. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Hawker, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Areas of morning frost north of Marla. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 24.
